As a student, I want to login with my university ID so I can see my profile.
As a teacher, I want to see a live list of students who are present.
As the system, I want to check if a student is within 10 meters of the classroom.
As a student, I want to get a push notification when my attendance is marked.
As an admin, I want to be able to manually fix attendance if there's a technical glitch.

As a developer, I want to set up the staging environment so we can show the MVP.
